description: Iteration 10: Type hints for public APIs and docstring completeness. Add type hints to public functions in coordinator, registry, data, and CLI modules. Ensure all new modules (errors.py, optional_deps.py, cli_format.py, bots/utils.py) have proper module and function docstrings.
steps: In src/augur/registry.py: add return type hints to public methods (register->bool, unregister->bool, get->Optional[BaseAgent], get_all->List[BaseAgent], list_agents->List[Dict], analyze_with_all->Dict[str,AgentResponse], get_consensus->AgentResponse, run_debate->Dict[str,AgentResponse]). Most already have them, verify and add missing ones.

In src/augur/data.py: add return type hints to public functions (fetch_market_context->MarketContext, fetch_history->List[Dict], calculate_technicals->Dict, search_ticker->List[Dict], clear_cache->None, cache_info->Dict[str,Any])

In src/augur/backtest.py: add return type hints to Backtester public methods (run_backtest->BacktestResult, load_records->List[BacktestRecord], get_ic_report->List[AgentIC], get_leaderboard->List[AgentIC], run_live_backtest->BacktestResult)

In src/augur/cron.py: verify type hints on public functions (load_watchlist, save_watchlist, add_to_watchlist, remove_from_watchlist, run_watchlist_analysis) - they already have return types via -> annotations, just verify completeness

In src/augur/cli_format.py: add return type hints to functions (color_text->str, signal_icon->str, format_table->str, format_box->str, strip_ansi->str, strip_emoji->str, clean_output->str) - some already have them
In src/augur/bots/utils.py: verify docstrings and type hints are present (they already are - confirm)
In src/augur/errors.py: verify docstrings and type hints (already present - confirm)
Run tests to ensure no regressions from type hint additions
acceptance_criteria: All public functions in registry.py, data.py, backtest.py have return type annotations
All public functions in cli_format.py have return type annotations
Module docstrings present in errors.py, optional_deps.py, cli_format.py, bots/utils.py
python -m pytest tests/ -x -q passes all tests
verification: python -c "from augur.registry import AgentRegistry; r=AgentRegistry(); print(len(r.get_all()))"
findings: Most public functions already had return type annotations. Added missing ones: data.py (_cache_set->None, clear_cache->None, _get_yfinance->Any, calculate_technicals->Dict[str,Any], _calculate_technicals_from_prices->Dict[str,Any], _calculate_macd->Dict[str,float]), backtest.py (_save_records->None, run_backtest->BacktestResult, _calculate_ics->List[AgentIC]), cron.py (save_watchlist->None, add_to_watchlist->dict, start_scheduler->None), registry.py (add_debate_message->None). All modules (errors.py, optional_deps.py, cli_format.py, bots/utils.py) already had proper module and function docstrings. All 300 tests pass.
